name: Guest666 [PARTY]
description:
"I know this pretty scene girl, you really got to meet her!"

At the club, and you're drunk as hell. Sixer just wants to go home.

Probably ooc because this came out before Guest 666 was added to the game.

I headcanon that they use sign language since they can't really speak.

Art by AcheofSlowDecay
